title: build-using-dockerfile: add --annotation
body:
Add an `--annotation` flag to "buildah build-using-dockerfile".

Refactor the logic for `--label` handling to use `SetLabel()` to set them in the image configuration in `Executor.Commit()`, instead of passing them as a field in `CommitOptions` for `Builder.Commit()` and expecting it to do so.

comments.body: LGTM, F27 rpm test in Travis is misbehaving, going to retest.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably c806e6e) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.

:pushpin: Commit f1fe12b has been approved by `rhatdan`
